name: W_Ar_dbleStar_to_1s
description: Effective cascade/feed-down weight from upper argon states into the Ar(4s/1s) precursor family; kept at 1 as a fiducial upper-limit because the result scales linearly with this unknown weight.

name: scale_Ar2nd
description: Optional global scale applied before the pure-Ar absolute anchor; keep at 1 unless doing sensitivity scans.

name: anchor_Ar2nd_to_pure_argon
description: If 1, rescale the reported Ar second-continuum channel so pure argon at the reference pressure is fixed to Y_Ar2nd_pure_ph_MeV; kept at 0 for direct kinetic spectra.

name: Y_Ar2nd_pure_ph_MeV
description: Absolute reference yield for the total Ar second-continuum channel in pure argon. With triplet_weight=0 the prompt component is anchored to f_S times this value.

name: reference_pressure_bar
description: Reference pressure used for the pure-argon second-continuum anchor.

name: reference_additive_fraction
description: Small additive fraction used numerically to represent pure argon in the degradation tables.

name: tau_Ar_star_ns
description: Effective finite Ar(4s/1s) precursor loss time. A finite value avoids saturating P_form and gives the expected pressure dependence.

name: K_Ar_star_Q_2Ar
description: Ternary formation coefficient in the pressure-normalised convention used by the model

name: K_Ar_star_Q_Ar
description: Direct Ar(4s/1s) loss by Ar; zero leaves formation as upper-limit channel

name: K_Ar_star_Q_CF4
description: CF4 competition/quenching of the Ar(4s/1s) precursor. Kept at zero by default because K_Ar_dbleStar_Q_CF4 from ArCF4_primary.csv is a fitted relative/effective quantity, not an absolute second-continuum precursor quenching rate.

name: K_Ar_star_Q_N2
description: Effective Ar(4s/1s) competition/quenching by N2, using K_ArMeta_Q_N2c + K_ArMeta_Q_N2b from the existing ArN2 primary model.

name: tau_S_ns
description: Singlet/fast Ar2* lifetime

name: tau_T_ns
description: Triplet/slow Ar2* lifetime

name: f_S
description: Backwards-compatible fallback singlet fraction used only if no gas-specific fraction is present.

name: f_S_CF4
description: Singlet/fast fraction used for the Ar--CF4 second-continuum branch; f_T = 1 - f_S = 0.846.

name: f_S_N2
description: Singlet/fast fraction used for the Ar--N2 second-continuum branch; f_T = 1 - f_S = 0.365.

name: triplet_weight
description: Weight applied to the slow triplet component. 0 keeps the physical prompt/fast estimate; 1 gives the singlet+triplet total.

name: K_Ar2starS_Q_Ar
description: Singlet excimer quenching by Ar

name: K_Ar2starT_Q_Ar
description: Triplet excimer quenching by Ar

name: K_Ar2starS_Q_CF4
description: Singlet excimer quenching by CF4; zero gives upper-limit estimate

name: K_Ar2starT_Q_CF4
description: Triplet excimer quenching by CF4; zero gives upper-limit estimate

name: K_Ar2starS_Q_N2
description: Singlet excimer quenching by N2

name: K_Ar2starT_Q_N2
description: Effective slow-triplet Ar2* quenching by N2. Kept configurable; use zero to recover an upper-limit estimate.

name: lambda_Ar2nd_nm
description: Central wavelength of the Ar second continuum

name: fwhm_Ar2nd_nm
description: Gaussian FWHM used to draw the Ar second-continuum band; converted internally to sigma

name: Br_CF4_D_to_X
description: Effective CF4+*(D)->CF4+(X) VUV branching ratio relative to the CF4 ionic UV channel

name: lambda_CF4_D_to_X_nm
description: Central wavelength of the CF4 ionic VUV branch

name: fwhm_CF4_D_to_X_nm
description: Gaussian FWHM used to draw the CF4 ionic VUV branch; converted internally to sigma
